specific_question: Did MediConn’s cybersecurity specialist complete all scheduled penetration tests of the firm's virtual healthcare systems in Q2 2025?
answer: Yes. According to internal testing logs, Brian Smith conducted all 6 penetration tests of the firm's virtual healthcare systems that were scheduled for that quarter.
dr_question: In 2026, how can MediConn Solutions defend its virtual healthcare platform against coordinated ransomware attacks facilitated by foreign nation-state cyber threat actors, ensuring uninterrupted access to clinical systems and patient safety?
